description: Golden corpus for routing evaluation. Each entry has a prompt and expected classification.

corpus.prompt: Fix the typo in the README
Add a console.log to the main function
What does the config module export?
Rename the variable from camelCase to snake_case in utils.mjs
Update the API docs for the new endpoint
Add a unit test for the cache module
Delete the unused helper function
Check if there are any security vulnerabilities in the auth module
Find all TODO comments in the codebase
Implement the login form with validation
First review the authentication module for security issues, then fix any vulnerabilities you find
Analyze the database queries for performance and then optimize the slow ones
Review the error handling across the API routes and refactor to use a consistent pattern
Plan the migration strategy and then implement the database schema changes
Research the best caching strategy and implement it for the API layer
Audit the test coverage and write tests for uncovered critical paths
Design the API for the new notification system and build the endpoints
Review and fix the race conditions in the worker queue
Document the architecture first, then refactor to match the documented design
Investigate the memory leak and then patch the root cause
Redesign the entire authentication system to support OAuth2, SAML, and API keys with proper session management, rate limiting, and audit logging
Build a comprehensive monitoring and alerting system with custom metrics, dashboards, anomaly detection, and automated remediation workflows
Refactor the monolithic application into microservices with proper service discovery, circuit breakers, distributed tracing, and event-driven communication
Design and implement a real-time collaboration system with conflict resolution, presence awareness, offline support, and cross-platform synchronization
Create a complete CI/CD pipeline with multi-environment deployment, blue-green releases, feature flags, automated rollback, and comprehensive test automation
Build a plugin system architecture that supports hot-reloading, sandboxed execution, dependency injection, versioned APIs, and marketplace distribution
Implement end-to-end encryption for the messaging system with key management, perfect forward secrecy, group encryption, and device verification
Design a multi-tenant data architecture with tenant isolation, cross-tenant analytics, custom schemas per tenant, and automated provisioning
Build a comprehensive permission system with RBAC, ABAC, resource-level permissions, delegation, and audit trails across all API endpoints
Create a data pipeline architecture with stream processing, batch ETL, schema evolution, data quality checks, and lineage tracking
